mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and impending economic contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment acceleration signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous contraction in residential construction starts and a sharp decline in mortgage applications indicate collapsing housing demand, which transmits to broader equity markets through wealth effects and yields negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint decline in HOUST and RSAFS fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns in more than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and robust corporate order books, which directly boosts earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in rising INDPRO periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above the 3.5% threshold forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high inflation readings.

mechanism_narrative: Strong non-farm payroll growth combined with a stable or declining unemployment rate confirms a healthy labor market expansion, supporting consumer spending and corporate profitability, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint strength in PAYEMS and stability in UNRATE fails to predict positive 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained quarterly growth in real GDP expands the corporate earnings base, which mechanically lifts equity valuations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in positive GDP growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A collapse in housing starts below 1.2 million units signals a severe downturn in the construction sector and broader consumer confidence, transmitting negative shocks to equity markets and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite housing starts falling below the threshold.
